selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a strictly rising real-time ADS index indicates accelerating real business conditions and selects QQQ; an equal or falling index selects SPY
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: the Philadelphia Fed real-activity acceleration mechanism is distinct from closed option-risk, positioning, rates, credit, liquidity, commodity, seasonal, price-trend and volatility lineages

program_multiplicity.method: Bonferroni across exactly the three frozen Epoch 5 mechanisms

signal.source: official Philadelphia Fed ADS all-vintages workbook
signal.formula: within the latest official ADS vintage dated strictly before execution, subtract the newest finite ADS observation on or before 28 calendar days earlier from the newest finite observation on or before the signal cutoff
signal.target_rule: strictly positive change means QQQ weight 1.0; equal or negative change means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: historical vintage date is conservatively assigned 20:00 America/New_York; both observations must come from the same eligible vintage and be available before the 20:05 signal freeze
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no current-vintage substitution, interpolation, alternate lag, threshold, source blend, persistence, smoothing, price filter or volatility filter
signal.ancestry_limitation: the 28-day horizon is an outcome-blind monthly acceleration proxy; using exact dated vintages prevents revised-current-history substitution but does not prove that 20:00 is the original intraday publication timestamp

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.016666666666666666 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
